falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (previous 2024 high) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key resistance would invalidate the bottom pattern and suggest a bullish trend rather than a hold

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 30-day average during a 5% rally
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Excessive buying volume during an upward move would contradict the 'hold' signal and indicate strong bullish conviction

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.8% and holds for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained increase in bond yields would indicate strong risk-on sentiment, invalidating the cautious 'hold' position

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
